description: Style Note Taking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist. Product Details Black tunic, has a round neck, three quarter sleeves with a buttoned closure and a mid buttoned tab, buttoned chest placket, slightly gathered from the waist on the front, a box pleat at the back with a buttoned tab on the middle and a curved hem with the back a little longer than the front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash in cold water at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Use a non chlorine bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
